narrative_constraints.statement: Achter- en voortuinen van grondgebonden woningen moeten voldoen aan beeldkwaliteitseisen (zoals geïllustreerd in het Beeldkwaliteitplan Nieuw Legmeer).

provenance.quoted_text: Achter- en voortuinen van grondgebonden woningen

reasons: Page contains only a heading and reference images illustrating front and back garden design quality for ground-level dwellings. No specific binding rules are stated; this is a visual reference page from a beeldkwaliteitplan.
Confidence limited as no numerical or explicit qualitative rules are stated, only illustrative photographs.

programme_hints: Page illustrates design quality references for front and back gardens of ground-level (grondgebonden) dwellings, including green facades, climbing plants, paved terraces, and street-facing garden walls.
